findings.detail: 実CLIコマンド（decision record / review record等）ではassertManagedWorktreeCommandAllowed（gate/context check）のrefreshが先に走って実際の同期書き込みを行い、その後のreconcileExecutionState→buildExecutionStateのrefreshが収束済みconfigをdiffしてunchangedを永続化するため、syncedイベントが監査trail（state.json）から消える。standalone再現スクリプトで実証。buildManagedWorktreeCommandBindingはgate出力からpolicy_syncをwhitelist-strippingしており、同期イベントはどこにも表面化しない。
test/e2e/...-main.spec.tsの全assertionがhardcoded文字列のincludes/matchで、src/を一切importせず実装が壊れていてもpassする。pr-bodyがこれをproduction path評価証拠として過大表示。

review_rounds.summary: Both prior block findings are resolved with reproduced evidence. Finding 1: syncWorktreePolicySections now durably stamps every real sync to worktree-side .vibepro/policy-sync.json via recordPolicySyncEvent and every refresh reads it back as policy_sync.last_event; buildManagedWorktreeCommandBinding no longer strips policy_sync. Reviewer re-ran own standalone repro replaying the decision record/review record CLI ordering against fed325a0: persisted execution state shows policy_sync.last_event={status:'synced',sections_updated:['budgets']} surviving the second refresh's 'unchanged' diff. Finding 2: the .spec.ts header now discloses it is a traceability-pin marker matching a pre-existing repo convention (independently verified against story-vibepro-cli-status-honesty-main.spec.ts), and a new real composed-flow e2e test exists which fails against the pre-fix source with a concrete TypeError (proven by temporary checkout of pre-fix src).
review_rounds.verification: shipped tests 7/7; broader suite incl. managed-worktree gate/execution-dag e2e + decision-records 24/24; typecheck pass; pre-fix failure of the new e2e test proven at 686a8596; independent standalone repro confirms last_event survives and gate binding output carries policy_sync
review_rounds.judgment_delta: block -> pass because both findings were independently re-verified against the actual fix rather than taken on the coordinator's word

review_rounds.summary: Delta fed325a0..78982951 is display-layer only plus additive test coverage: formatManagedWorktreeSummary renders policy_sync into the default text summary (no other parser consumer via grep), and two new tests close the buildManagedWorktreeGate call-site gap and the default-output surface gap. Re-ran relevant suite 26/26 pass + typecheck pass.
review_rounds.judgment_delta: pass(fed325a0) -> pass(78982951) because the diff only adds read-only text rendering of already-audited policy_sync data and two new passing tests closing a previously-unverified call site and surface; no sync/audit logic changed
